description: Master Premier team showcased to debut Community Day Baxcalibur with Glaive Rush. Metagross leads with Shadow Claw pressure, Gyarados is the safe swap that farms relentless Aqua Tails, and Baxcalibur closes by farming down with cheap, fast Glaive Rush.
performanceNotes: Baxcalibur's Glaive Rush is extremely cheap (only ~10 turns) and picks up super-effective one-hit KOs to farm down weakened backlines
Gyarados consistently dominates Snorlax/Floette matchups by stacking Aqua Tails for energy and damage
Team is very weak to fairy types in the back and struggles when Baxcalibur ends up down a shield or facing ground types like Excadrill

sources.author: HomeSliceHenry
sources.videoTitle: *NEW* GLAIVE RUSH BAXCALIBUR has arrived in the Master Premier Cup!
